mitm.title: Security keys — mitmproxy log
mitm.description: Optionally paste the contents of a mitmproxy log to auto-fill security keys. Leave empty to enter keys manually in the next step.

data_description.mitm_log: Full mitmproxy log contents. The integration will automatically extract LTK, Session Key and Session ID.

device.title: Device security data
device.description: Enter the BLE address and security keys for your SoloMini.

data_description.address: BLE MAC address. Pre-filled when auto-discovered.

pick_device.title: Select device
pick_device.description: The following SoloMini devices were found nearby.

keys.title: Key entry method
keys.description: Choose how you want to enter the security keys.

data_description.method: Mitmproxy log: capture app communication. Pairing: for factory reset devices.

pair.title: Pair device
pair.description: Make sure the device is in factory reset state (unpaired). Enter the BLE address and click Submit.

error.invalid_actions: Invalid action numbers. Enter comma-separated numbers, e.g. 0,1
error.invalid_hex: Invalid hex format or wrong length.
error.parse_failed: Could not extract data from log. Make sure the log contains a security API call.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the BLE address.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the device is in factory reset state.
